title: newsletter — compliance evidence
description: CAN-SPAM + CASL enforcement is central here. Double-opt-in + one-click unsubscribe + consent_evidence per subscription + full audit trail via HasAudit.

controls.evidence: sender_config.from_email + from_name enforced per newsletter. Overlays tenant identity.
sender_config.postal_address required. Injected into every issue footer by notifications-mail.
One-click unsubscribe via signed URL. Processed in seconds; audit-logged. NotificationPreference also updated cross-channel.
confirmation_required flag on Newsletter. All new public subscriptions start pending_confirmation. Enforced by observer.
consent_evidence JSONB captured per subscription: source_url + form_id + consent_text_hash + timestamp.
Explicit opt-in with signed confirmation link. consent_evidence retained.
consent_evidence includes the exact consent text hash + form URL + timestamp — demonstrable.
HasAudit on NewsletterSubscription produces the records trail.
notifications-mail injects List-Unsubscribe + List-Unsubscribe-Post headers for every newsletter delivery. Signed URL routes to /unsubscribe/{token} POST.
React Email templates validated by CI.
